theme.archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast adapted for Premium Consumer Utility)
theme.description: Premium, clean, trust-oriented UI. Relies on crisp whites, a strong 'Trust Blue', and soft rounded cards with explicit depth. Mobile-first bottom-sheet driven architecture mimicking native app flow.

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-screen overflow-hidden flex flex-col bg-background relative shadow-2xl
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6 for containers. gap-4, gap-6 for lists.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inner elements, rounded-full for buttons/avatars

ui_patterns.bottom_navigation: Fixed at bottom, max-w-md mx-auto, 4 tabs (Home, Bookings, Offers, Profile). Uses Lucide icons.
ui_patterns.bottom_sheets: Use Shadcn Drawer or Dialog for filters, time slot selection, and booking confirmation.
ui_patterns.service_cards: Rounded cards (rounded-2xl) with top image, padding (p-4), clear title, ratings (star icon + text), and starting price.
ui_patterns.category_grid: 3x3 grid (grid-cols-3 gap-4). Items have a soft background (bg-slate-50), an icon centrally aligned, and a small label below.
ui_patterns.trust_signals: Always show 'Verified' badge (blue check), average rating, and review count prominently on provider and service details.

components.buttons: Shadcn Button heavily customized. Primary buttons: rounded-full, h-12, text-base font-semibold. Hover state slightly lighter with transform scale.
components.inputs: Shadcn Input. h-12, rounded-xl, bg-slate-50 border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20.
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs. Used for 'My Bookings' (Active/Completed/Cancelled). W-full, grid layout for tab list.
components.calendar: Shadcn Calendar for date selection in booking flow. Followed by a custom grid of selectable time slots (pill shape).

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Slide up for new screens (simulating native mobile navigation stack).
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) on desktop, active scale down (active:scale-95) on mobile touch.
motion_and_interactions.splash_screen: Animated logo fade-in, background subtle pulse, transitioning to Auth/Home after 2.5s.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 2 for clarity. Category icons should be wrapped in a circular or rounded-xl soft background container.

splash_background.description: Abstract blue and white waves for splash screen background

offer_banners.description: Living room soft background for Cleaning / General offers
Clean AC unit background for Appliance/AC repair offers

services_and_professionals.description: Two women in uniform cleaning a modern living room

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a mobile-first web app mimicking React Native. Wrap the entire application routing/views inside a main container: <div className='w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] bg-background relative shadow-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col'>. This ensures the app looks like a phone screen on desktop and takes full screen on mobile.
Use framer-motion for page transitions and micro-interactions.

Implement the bottom navigation bar as a fixed element inside the max-w-md container, not fixed to the actual window viewport if on desktop. Use absolute positioning at the bottom of the relative container.
Hide the main scrollbar for the content area using CSS utility '.hide-scrollbar { scrollbar-width: none; -ms-overflow-style: none; } .hide-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }'.
For date/time picking, combine Shadcn Calendar component with a custom Pill-based grid for Time Slots.
Every interactive element MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case role-based (e.g., data-testid='book-now-button').
Never use generic placeholder images. Use the provided URLs in the media section for services, banners, and splash screen.
